name: Pumpkin Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers crumbs and melted margarine; press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a bowl, mix together the Neufchatel cheese, half of the sugar, and vanilla on an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Reserve some of the mixture; add pumpkin, remaining sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg to the rest.
5. Mix well.
6. Layer half of the pumpkin mixture and half of the cheese mixture over the crust.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Cut through the batter several times with a knife for a marble effect.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 55 minutes.
10. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim.
11. Chill. Serves 10-12.
